scripts.build: esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --outfile=../backend/static/js/main.js && esbuild src/question.ts --bundle --outfile=../backend/static/js/question.js && esbuild src/paper.ts --bundle --outfile=../backend/static/js/paper.js
scripts.build:prod: esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --minify --outfile=../backend/static/js/main.js && esbuild src/question.ts --bundle --minify --outfile=../backend/static/js/question.js && esbuild src/paper.ts --bundle --minify --outfile=../backend/static/js/paper.js
